title: Senior Backend Engineer - Synthetic Monitoring | Spain | Remote
score_reasoning: Your 7 years of backend experience and proven track record with microservices, observability (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus), and cloud infrastructure (AWS/Docker) align very well with Grafana's senior backend role. The synthetic monitoring team's Go-based, Kubernetes-heavy distributed system is a strong match for your distributed systems expertise, though your lack of Kubernetes production experience (a primary requirement) creates a modest gap. Your Python/Go foundation and observability focus directly support the role's needs. The remote-first setup from Spain fits your location preferences and timezone (CET aligns with Spain), and Grafana Labs is explicitly a notable brand with strong CV value, supporting career growth in observability. The main constraint is Kubernetes experience, which is stated as 'demonstrated experience working with and monitoring Kubernetes in a production environment'—this is a core requirement that you don't yet possess, but your Docker and infrastructure background provide a credible bridge.

red_flags: No Kubernetes production experience (stated as primary requirement for the role)
Limited advanced message queue/pub-sub architecture design (role involves designing scalable multi-tenant systems)
Limited large-scale system design evidence beyond individual microservices (senior role expects broader architectural scope)
